creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
devel/p5-Moo stopped using Dist::CheckConflicts. It's no longer used, and the dependency could be removed.

p5-Dist-CheckConflicts:
  From Changes 1.004_003:

  - remove Dist::CheckConflicts prerequisite and replace with a test to report
    known broken downstream modules

[root@apnoea /usr/ports/devel/p5-Moo/work/Moo-1.007000] grep -rl Dist::CheckConflicts *
Changes
